title: Any right of a personal representative of a deceased employee to
content:
a severance payment, where that right had not accrued before the 
employee’s death, shall devolve as if it had accrued before his 
death.
(Third Schedule added 67 of 1974 s. 6)
Last updated date
1.5.2025
